mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_post(id, title, content, cover, description, create_time, update_time, category_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{content}, #{cover}, #{description}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{categoryId})
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, cover = #{cover}, description = #{description}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, category_id = #{categoryId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, cover, description, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM blog_post WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, title, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM blog_post WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.create_time as createTime, p.update_time as updateTime FROM blog_post p INNER JOIN blog_post_tag bpt ON p.id = bpt.post_id WHERE bpt.tag_id = #{tagId} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
